---

## Feature Summary

Describe the feature.

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature fix?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how the feature should work.

## Example Use Case

Example:

```text
As a user, I want to select IV or IM manually so I can see only the route I need.
```

## Screens / UI Notes

Describe any UI changes.

## Safety Considerations

Does this feature affect medication values, calculation logic, or real-world interpretation?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

If yes, explain.
